title: Rekaman Hening Layar Usang
theme: Menjelajahi keheningan dan jejak masa lalu di sebuah bioskop tua, seorang penulis menemukan petunjuk misteri kecil yang membutuhkan perhatian, menguak memori yang tertinggal.

cover.prompt: Exterior view of an aged cinema building, named 'Pelangi' (Rainbow), displaying a softened, worn facade that speaks of the gentle passage of time. A vintage neon sign above the entrance, mostly unilluminated, reveals only a few letters with a soft, inviting glow. The surroundings are tranquil, bathed in a warm, gentle illumination of late afternoon. The scene evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and quietude, highlighting the building as a peaceful, intriguing escape. A lone, distant silhouette stands near the entrance, observing the structure, emphasizing the solitude and atmospheric scale. Cinematic composition with a shallow depth of field, focusing on the illuminated sign and the building's gentle charm.
cover.style: Lo-fi aesthetic, vintage film grain, nostalgic feel

meta.plan_summary: Anya, a young writer, finds inspiration in an old, quiet cinema. She uncovers a recurring mystery involving a ticket and a faint perfume, leading her to a hidden journal detailing a poignant, unfulfilled love story. Inspired, she writes a tribute, continuing a silent ritual at the cinema.
